reviews.review_description: The wing positions on the controllers are fully adjustable, so you can dial in the perfect setup, even if you’re playing in a small space. And the haptics, paired with the streamlines, do an amazing job of conveying airflow, making every glide and turn feel intuitive and incredibly satisfying.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the feedback, happy to hear you enjoy the controls.

reviews.review_description: It took me a few levels to get the hang of it, but once I did I was gliding inches above the ground with a huge smile on my face. The flying is fantastic and is perfectly implemented with the controllers. You don't have to have your arms straight out, you can have them in whatever position you want, and small changes to the angle has you gliding up or diving down with haptic feedback to keep you in the zone.  One suggestion would be to add a free fly level where you can just enjoy the flying mechanic on an endless level without starting over if you crash. Very zen. Looking forward to where the developer takes this.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the great feedback, and hope you are enjoying our regular updates.

reviews.review_description: Flying in this game feels amazing. It's incredibly responsive and intuitive, requiring precision movements from the player to achieve optimal times in the tracks. The tracks themselves are plentiful and varied. I had a lot of fun trying different routes to the finish line trying to find the fastest one. If you're a fan of Trackmania style time challenges and flying in VR, you'll love this game!

developer_response.body: We love the comparison to Trackmania, which is one of our biggest inspirations for this game. Thank you for the feedback, keep flying to beat the high-scores of other surfers!

reviews.review_description: I got this in the reddit giveaway (thank you very very much kind developers) and it feels even better than gravity magic in blade and sorcery (if you know you know) and i truly can’t wait for more levels. An idea is a rocket mode where there are fireworks or smtg on you wings/glides (idk) where you go three times faster but overall great work and i can’t wait to see where this goes! (also finally an actually good game on the quest store and not some brainrotted garbage.)

developer_response.body: You are welcome, and congrats for winning the giveaway! Thank you for playing and reviewing our game, hope you are enjoying our updates.

reviews.review_description: You have very precise control of your flying, which gives the game a high skill ceiling. The feeling when you drop down from a cliff and try to grind as close to the ground as possible to get some extra speed boost is amazing! If you are into games like Trackmania, where you try again and again to grind those few milliseconds for a better spot on the high score, or rather enjoy the flying instead of fighting in Population One, this is the game for you!

developer_response.body: We appreciate the great reviews, and being compared to Trackmania is an honor.

reviews.review_title: FLY FAST, FLOW FREE IN VR. TOP GAME!
reviews.review_description:
Take flight with your arms as wings, glide through high-speed tracks, chase times and master perfect runs. 
Simple to pick up, but rich in challenges to master, you'll revel in skimming the ground, searching for the best route, and taking maximum risks to break all records!
Pure flow. Pure VR. Pure fun!

developer_response.body: Pure great reviews. Thank you so much, hope you are enjoying our updates.

reviews.review_description: Top 5 go to games. Please make another or more levels dlc!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind words! Stay tuned for future updates ;)

reviews.review_description:
This is very much a game that is not for everyone. Unlike your average NFS, Forza, or Gran Turismo, which offers up more than just going from start to finish in Aerosurfer you have "wings" strapped to your hand and glide across a course to net the best time. 

It's certainly made for those who want to wish to compete and climb the leaderboards but offers little to keep the average gamer coming back. 

You'll tilt your controllers to change your flight angle and use the triggers to dip closer to the ground. Graphics are ok but the world is full of blocky textures and its nothing to write home about.

developer_response.body:
Sorry to hear the game wasn't for you!
We have new features and game modes on the roadmap so make sure to check back in when the next update drops.

reviews.review_description: good game with a smooth flow, soundtrack was nice aswell. Reminds me of counter strike surf maps in a way.

developer_response.body: Being compared to Counter Strike surfing is definitely an honor. Thanks for the kind words, we are happy to hear you are enjoy the game.
